meaning: for you/to you (connected to فَتَحْنَا - we opened)

very strong/mighty (describing Allah in this ayah)
He (refers to Allah in this ayah)

armies, troops (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)

All-Knowing (describing how اللَّهُ was and is)

from them (referring to المؤمنين والمؤمنات - the believing men and women)

that (referring to the great success mentioned after)
and the female hypocrites (in genitive case)
and the polytheists (joined in list with المنافقين)
and the female ones who join others with Allah
the ones who think wrongly (acted upon by يُعَذِّبَ - will punish)
the circle (subject of السَّوْءِ - of evil)

upon them (referring to the hypocrites and polytheists mentioned earlier)

for them (referring to the hypocrites and polytheists mentioned earlier)

mighty (describing اللَّهُ, in a way that completes the meaning)
All-Wise (describing Allah in عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا - Mighty, Wise)

and as a bearer of good news

in the morning (describing when تُسَبِّحُوهُ happens)

their hands/powers (referring to those who pledge allegiance)

Allah (as the object of يُبَايِعُونَ - they pledge allegiance to)

a reward/payment (as the object being given)
those who are left behind (subject of سَيَقُولُ)

anything (that could be controlled by Allah)

a harm (that Allah wants for you)

any benefit (object of أَرَادَ - he intended)
rather/but rather (correcting what was said before)

the evil (object of ظَنَّ - evil thought)

Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرُ - He forgives)

so that you all may take it

a small amount (object of يَفْقَهُونَ - they understand)

believers (group of men or mixed group)
